description_long: This is a stylized representation of a Dachshund dog, characterized by its elongated body, short legs, and long, drooping ears. The dog has a smooth, short coat in a muted brownish-gray color, with slightly lighter tones on the paws and muzzle. Its face is expressive, with large, almond-shaped eyes and a prominent, slightly pointed snout. The tail is long and tapers to a point, held straight out behind the body. The overall form is sleek and streamlined, with subtle muscle definition along the torso and limbs. No collar or accessories are visible, and the surface appears matte and soft to the touch.
description: A stylized, brown-gray Dachshund with a long body, short legs, floppy ears, and a straight tail, featuring a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's face, large eyes, drooping ears, and straight forelegs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, short legs, and straight tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, ears, and tail, with both hind legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the long torso, short legs, and tail alignment.
